title: proptest-list-ids-cardinality: list_ids().len() == N after N creates
body:
# Goal

Property 5 from the `df74809` follow-up list. After N successful
`create_issue` calls on a fresh repo, `Storage::list_ids().len() == N`.
Each minted id is unique.

# Why now

Small, self-contained, lower-leverage than the dep-graph properties — but
catches an entire bug class (id-collision, silent-deletion-on-create,
list-index drift) for almost no implementation cost. Lands the cheapest
remaining piece of harness coverage.

# Approach

- `create_issue` N times against a fresh repo (N ∈ 1..=8). Collect minted ids.
- Assert `storage.list_ids().len() == N`.
- Assert minted ids are pairwise distinct.
- Assert each minted id appears in `list_ids()`.

# References

- Parent: `df74809` (qa-proptest-harness), commit `28e5ed71`.
- 7-char id-collision birthday probability: 1 in 2^28; at N=8 collisions are vanishingly rare. Property is about cardinality, not collision-probability.

# Acceptance

- New property `list_ids_cardinality_matches_creates` ships green at 16 cases.
